name: Wall Lab — barriers, blocking & burn-on-entry (D-WALL-1)
description: Bench for wall spells as REAL barriers (not the old line-burst). Mason the Wallwright (your only hero — drive him) carries all six wall spells. PLACE A WALL WITH TWO CLICKS: pick the spell, click one end of the wall (first click, within range), then click the far end (second click) — the hex line between them becomes the wall, capped at the spell's length. The preview shows exactly which hexes it occupies; RIGHT-CLICK ANYWHERE cancels. BLOCKING (Wall of Force / Wall of Stone / Wall of Ice): drop a vertical wall at about column 14 spanning the foes' lane (e.g. click (14,4) then (14,14)) — the Raiders to the east can no longer path through it and must go the long way around (or stop). BURN-ON-ENTRY (Wall of Fire / Wall of Thorns / Blade Barrier): these DON'T block movement (Fire is opaque, so it also blocks line of sight), but a creature that walks into the wall's space OR starts its turn there takes the damage with no save — drop a Wall of Fire across the Raiders' path and watch them cook as they cross. A wall cast directly on top of a creature burns it immediately. Walls are concentration-linked: drop concentration (or break it) and the wall vanishes. The Pillar Dummy (immobile, 400 HP) sits east so you can wall it in or burn it at leisure.
